title: Japanese Stir Fry
description: A classic Japanese dish made with tender beef, garlic, and a variety of vegetables, cooked to perfection in a savory stir-fry sauce.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of sesame oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes. Remove from the skillet and set aside.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced bell peppers and cook for 2-3 minutes, until tender.
Add the sliced snow peas and cook for 1 minute, until tender.
Return the beef to the skillet and stir in the soy sauce and oyster sauce (if using).
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the beef is coated in the sauce.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
